Title: GRANT ROLE
Description: Add one or more role privileges to one or more users
See also: REVOKE ROLE , GRANT PRIVILEGES , CREATE ROLE .
Examples:
GRANT
role_name
[, ... ] TO
user_login_name
[, ... ]
    [ WITH ADMIN OPTION ]
    [ WITH ADMIN
grantor
]
GRANT controller TO jan WITH ADMIN OPTION;
